site.title: Huy Hieu Nguyen | AI Engineer & Research Assistant

home.bio: AI Engineer at Viettel Cyber Security & Research Assistant at AI Network Innovation lab.
home.bioSecondary: My research interests include AI and Deep Learning in general, espeacially algorithmic based topic.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.text: I am an AI Engineer at Viettel Cyber Security and a Research Assistant at AINI (AI Network Innovation) Labs, Hanoi University of Science and Technology. My research focuses on federated learning, deep learning for network traffic classification, and LLM-based AI systems. I am passionate about bridging the gap between academic research and real-world applications in cybersecurity and AI.

entries.institution: Hanoi University of Civil Engineering (Top 7 Engineering Universities in Vietnam)
HUS High School for Gifted Students
Nguyen Truong To Secondary School, Hanoi

entries.desc: Building AI workflow and Chatbot using Dify.AI platform. Developing MCP servers to connect LLM models with company knowledge.

entries.company: AINI Labs, Hanoi University of Science and Technology
entries.desc: Applying Deep Learning techniques for real-time encrypted network traffic classification. Federated Learning research focusing on Non-IID data, straggler effect, and privacy preservation.

entries.company: IT & Database Center, Hanoi University of Civil Engineering
entries.desc: Research on network system problems. Deploying e-learning system for the university.
